cases.title: New table always with RLS
cases.prompt: Create a `documents` table where users can only see and modify their own documents, and org admins can see all documents in their org. Include the full SQL: CREATE TABLE, RLS enable, and all policies.

cases.title: Service layer with Zod validation
cases.prompt: Implement the full data access layer for a `projects` resource: Zod schema, service class, cached data fetcher, and a Server Action using the service. No raw Supabase calls outside the service.

cases.title: Fix N+1 query with nested select
cases.prompt: A page lists projects and for each project shows the number of tasks. The current code makes one query per project. Show the N+1 problem clearly, then fix it with a single Supabase nested select.

cases.title: Org-based RLS with role check
cases.prompt: Write RLS policies for a `invoices` table: members can view, accountants and owners can create/update, only owners can delete. Use organization_members with role column.

cases.title: Table with correct schema conventions
cases.prompt: Create the full migration SQL for a `subscriptions` table with soft delete, timestamps, a status check constraint, foreign key with CASCADE, and the updated_at trigger. Follow all schema conventions.
